content:
March Update!

~~NEW SOURCE SHEET:
https://drive.google.com/drive/folders/1sOyopUbBhgpdZbew2WezbOrwXlmK0OoC~~

All current content, up-to-date, in all 11 languages. This includes all human translation done by us and the volunteers, and the rest are still machine translated.
If you note an error in-game or have a part of the game content you want to work on, you can find it here.
**
NOTE: YOU MUST FIRST SIGN THE NDA TO ACCESS THE SOURCE SHEET.**

UPDATE: 2025/03/16 
RU language was accidentally left out. We added it back. Sorry for the confusion!
**NEW SOURCESHEET LINK: https://drive.google.com/file/d/142p-ltU9wntX3bZ_voyn35Gzml6i_qwz/view?usp=drivesdk**

NEW TERM BASE:
https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1jBBfRth1v3n2T5J7k3fZ67E0LsvjcL46/edit?usp=drivesdk&ouid=109115841955076800121&rtpof=true&sd=true

All current terms in all 11 languages, sorted by type.
If you have previously contributed to translating the ~1k IMPORTANT TERMS, those translations should also be included in here. The rest of
You can edit terms you found incorrect, then submit them via Github. When submitting, please only include the terms you changed. No need to include all 11 languages.

embeds.description: Web word processing, presentations and spreadsheets
